name: TBI Detection/Monitoring Kit
notes: Neuro monitoring and observation aids. Includes portable tools for detecting ICH and monitoring GCS and neurological status in patients with suspected TBI.

name: Auto Burr Hole Kit
notes: For suspected elevated ICP with delayed evacuation

name: Pentobarbital Sedation Kit
notes: For seizure control and sedation in high-risk patients and to reduce metabolic rate

name: Benzodiazepine Sedation Kit
notes: For seizure control and sedation in high-risk patients

name: Ketamine Analgesia Kit
notes: For analgesia support in high-risk trauma patients and to reduce cortical spreading depolarization
